title: Fancy Death messages
description: Changes all death messages to more funnier ones!
body:
# FANCY DEATH MESSAGES
This resource pack changes the death messages to a lot funier ones. _In future when I will get more ideas for the death messages,I will surely make an updated version of it._
### Installation Guide
- If it shows that this pack is incompatible for this version etc etc, just activate this pack by clicking ok.
- This pack doesn't add any heavy things because it only changes a file and nothing else so it is extremely lightweight.
- If you are facing an issue or something while using this resource pack, reach out to me on my youtube channel and make a post of the bug in my community.. Or just comment one in my videos. 👍 
**It is server friendly**
> Works on both Optifine and Sodium
> **Here is an example**
>

</details>
